title: Spiritborne Ascendants
description: A mod that plans to add Souls-like bosses to Minecraft | The Reaper boss
body:
![The Reaper Boss GIF](https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/ca724a22cab7.gif)

This mod introduces high-quality, challenging boss encounters to Minecraft.  It is **planned to be used with** my main mod : [**Spiritborne RPG**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiritborne-rpg). Be sure to check it out!

*** **Status** - Work In Progress (WIP - 70% Complete) | **Difficulty** - Late-Game | **Base HP** - 300 The Reaper is a highly aggressive boss focused on speed and disruptive abilities. Its current moveset includes : * Standard Melee Attack * Teleport Attack * Self-Buffs * Six additional moves for you to discover * (Fully functional but many more are planned and currently under development) **Current Loot Drop** : The boss currently drops a Reaper Soul and 2-4x Wraithcloth..   ***

How to Summon The Reaper

The Reaper boss is summoned through a dark ritual involving two custom items : the Sacrificial Dagger and the Soul Bottle. 1. **Craft** the Sacrificial Dagger. 2. Holding a Glass Bottle in your offhand, **slay a Villager** with the Sacrificial Dagger to capture its essence, creating a **Soul Bottle**. 3. Right-click on fire with Soul Bottle to summon **The Reaper**. _**Sacrificial Dagger** can be crafted by the following recipe :_

  *** ## Bone Scepter The Bone Scepter is a magic weapon crafted using boss materials. It inflicts Weakness on hit and can summon a line of Abyssal Ruptures by right-clicking.  

![The Reaper Boss GIF](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYzExa2MyeXhqdnQ1MGduOTRma2tnbXh6dGk0bnhrcWRpNDlvamlvcyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/eYpjCbY6I0cn9HTt4Z/giphy.gif)

- The item first needs to be awakened by right click the scepter while holding Reaper Soul in your offhand. - 5 Attack Damge, 1.2 Attack Speed, and 256 Durability. - On Hit : 50% chance to inflict 2 second Weakness. - On Right Click : Summon a line of Abyssal Ruptures in front of you, consuming 3% durability. - Can be repaired with Wraithcloth (more ways of reparing are planned in future updates) ---

🔧Required Dependencies

* [**Geckolib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) > This mod is also available in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spiritborne-ascendants)
